reviews.originalComment: Hotel nyaman dan bersih cocok untuk penginapan liburan bersama keluarga kecil karena depan hotel ada tempat Bermain dengan anak anak,staf juga baik2 dan ramah, untuk harga penginapan juga sangat bersahabat 👍
reviews.reviewComments: A comfortable and clean hotel suitable for a holiday stay with a small family because there is a playground for children in front of the hotel, the staff are also nice and friendly, and the accommodation prices are very affordable. 👍

reviews.reviewPositives: The location

reviews.originalComment: Kalau hotel ini best banget perfect pertahankan lokasi strategis, untuk saya yang perdana ke Aceh sangat exited
reviews.reviewComments: If this hotel is really great, maintain its strategic location. For me, being new to Aceh, I am very excited.

reviews.reviewPositives: Staff was very nice, offered us a free upgrade and held our luggage while we were on Pulau Weh. Room was clean and spacious.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Only 1 towel per person.

Breakfast had a great variety of choices, however, they were continuously running out of food items, and they were slow to replace them.

Food at the top roof bar was expensive and mediocre.

reviews.reviewComments: i love this location of hotel. their buffet breakfast is okay. but the room and furniture is quite old. especially the toilet. toilet floor keep flooding.
reviews.roomTypeName: Superior Queen Room (No View) with No Windows

reviews.reviewPositives: Easy to find the food nearest hotel.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nil

reviews.reviewComments: This is a very beautiful hotel. Had a nice outlook from outside and beautiful lobby with nice chandeliers. Room and toilet was spacious and clean. Bed pillow was comfortable. Hot water was nice. Soap was scented. Buffet breakfast was simple and nice.

reviews.reviewTitle: Très Bon pour une nuit et ce prix!
reviews.reviewPositives: Belle Terasse sur le toit.

reviews.reviewComments: Dekat dengan Blang Padang, tempat rekreasi pagi dan petang. Banyak kedai makan makan sekitar hotel.

reviews.reviewPositives: La localisation en plein centre, la taille des logements, le rooftop, le petit déjeuner copieux et le personnel.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Le restaurant disposait d'une carte importante mais, en réalité, aucun plat n'était disponible (aucun stock) hormis des frites... 
La propreté et l'entretien de la chambre laissaient un peu à désirer contrairement à ce qu'affiche l'hôtel sur ses photos (papiers peints décollés, fils électriques apparents, etc.).

reviews.originalComment: Hotel nyaman dan bersih cocok untuk penginapan liburan bersama keluarga kecil karena depan hotel ada tempat Bermain dengan anak anak,staf juga baik2 dan ramah, untuk harga penginapan juga sangat bersahabat 👍
reviews.reviewComments: A comfortable and clean hotel suitable for a holiday stay with a small family because there is a playground for children in front of the hotel, the staff are also nice and friendly, and the accommodation prices are very affordable. 👍

reviews.reviewPositives: The location

reviews.originalComment: Kalau hotel ini best banget perfect pertahankan lokasi strategis, untuk saya yang perdana ke Aceh sangat exited
reviews.reviewComments: If this hotel is really great, maintain its strategic location. For me, being new to Aceh, I am very excited.

reviews.reviewNegatives:
Only 1 towel per person.

Breakfast had a great variety of choices, however, they were continuously running out of food items, and they were slow to replace them.

Food at the top roof bar was expensive and mediocre.

reviews.roomTypeName: Superior Queen Room (No View) with No Windows

reviews.reviewPositives: Easy to find the food nearest hotel.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nil

reviews.reviewComments: This is a very beautiful hotel. Had a nice outlook from outside and beautiful lobby with nice chandeliers. Room and toilet was spacious and clean. Bed pillow was comfortable. Hot water was nice. Soap was scented. Buffet breakfast was simple and nice.

reviews.reviewTitle: Très Bon pour une nuit et ce prix!
reviews.reviewPositives: Belle Terasse sur le toit.

reviews.reviewComments: Dekat dengan Blang Padang, tempat rekreasi pagi dan petang. Banyak kedai makan makan sekitar hotel.

reviews.reviewPositives: La localisation en plein centre, la taille des logements, le rooftop, le petit déjeuner copieux et le personnel.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Le restaurant disposait d'une carte importante mais, en réalité, aucun plat n'était disponible (aucun stock) hormis des frites... 
La propreté et l'entretien de la chambre laissaient un peu à désirer contrairement à ce qu'affiche l'hôtel sur ses photos (papiers peints décollés, fils électriques apparents, etc.).

reviews.reviewTitle: the best hotels in Banda Aceh
reviews.originalTitle: antara hotel yang terbaik di Banda Aceh
reviews.originalComment: mungkin akan menginap di sini lagi jika ke Banda Aceh. bilik bersih dan selesa.
reviews.reviewComments: I might stay here again if I go to Banda Aceh. The room is clean and comfortable.

reviews.reviewPositives: Top
reviews.reviewNegatives: Top

reviews.originalComment: Bakal kembali lagi kemari,hitelnya nyaman,wangi,apalagi gaknpelit sabun dab sahampoo 1 botol penuh,ditambah lagi makanannya enak enak,wahhh klw liburan ke aceh bakal nginap disana lagi.
reviews.reviewComments: I will come back here again, the bed is comfortable, fragrant, plus they are generous with soap and shampoo, a full bottle, and the food is delicious. Wow, if I go on vacation to Aceh, I will stay there again.

reviews.reviewPositives: Sehr gute und praktische Lage, z.B. sind große Moschee und Tsunami-Museum fußläufig sehr gut erreichbar. Gemütliche Betten.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
Zimmer war nicht sauber (tote Insekten auf dem Boden, teilweise etwas "klebrig", Fenster nicht sauber, Geruch im Bad etc.), Jeder Punkt für sich genommen nicht schrecklich, aber ich hatte insgesamt einen höheren Standard in dem Hotel erwartet.
Frühstück tatsächlich unbrauchbar für Europäer (hatte in anderer Bewertung Ähnliches gelesen, aber bin davon ausgegangen dass ich als experimentierfreudiger Mensch hier trotzdem fündig werde). Personal ist nicht negativ aufgefallen, aber auch definitiv nicht besonders freundlich.

reviews.reviewComments: Good location, room is comfy and clean. The staffs is really helpful when I request to change and upgrade my room.

reviews.reviewPositives:
Ordentliches First Class Hotel in Bester Lage in Banda Aceh, direkt am "Thanks the World" Monument. Für ein, zwei Tage eine gute Wahl mit gutem Preis Leistungsverhältnis!
Highlight ist die Dachterrasse mit relativ guten Preisen!

reviews.originalComment: Lokasinya sangat strategis, kemana mana deket. Kamarnya lumanyan lega, cuma kekurangan pemeliharaan interiornya kurang diperhatikan. Propertinya ada yang rusak tidak diperbaiki, seperti kursi yang tekelupas kulitnya, pintu kamar mandi sudah lapuk dibwahnya sedikit, wallpaper yng tekelupas. selebihnya bagus
reviews.reviewComments: The location is very strategic, everything is close by. The room is quite spacious, but it lacks attention to interior maintenance. There are some damaged properties that have not been repaired, such as a chair with peeling leather, the bathroom door is a bit rotten at the bottom, and the wallpaper is peeling. Other than that, it's good.
reviews.roomTypeName: Superior Queen Room (No View) with No Windows

reviews.reviewPositives: De locatie is top! Erg in het centrum. Vriendelijk personeel, ontbijt was simpel voor een westerling maar prima.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Het was niet helemaal schoon in de kamer en we hadden vies beddengoed. Hier en daar kan het hotel een likje verf gebruiken en een nieuw behangetje plakken, maar naast dat is het prima verblijven voor in Banda Aceh.

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya bersih, rapi dan bagus. Semua berfungsi dengan baik, bersih jugaa. Pertahankan kesempuranaan ini. Mantaaaaaap !!
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, tidy, and nice. Everything works well, and it's clean too. Keep up this perfection. Awesome!!

reviews.reviewPositives: Prima bedden in een grote kamer. Centrale ligging in een rustige omgeving. Winkels, restaurants en bezienswaardigheden op 5-10 min. lopen.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Geen warm water zowel in de ochtend als avond niet. Dat is een flinke tegenvaller voor een hotel in deze prijsklasse.

reviews.originalComment: Nyaman, aman dan lingkungan hijau serta jogging tinngal melangkah ke depan hotel di area lapangan. Di sana banyak pula kuliner. Jadi asyik...
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable, safe, and a green environment, as well as jogging right in front of the hotel in the field area. There are also many culinary options there. It's really enjoyable...

reviews.reviewPositives: Bedden, roofterrace
reviews.reviewNegatives: Douche water loopt slecht weg. T is enigszins vergane glorie, maar prima voor een nachtje.

reviews.reviewComments: Has great access to everywhere at the city and the hotel interior is really exquisite

reviews.reviewTitle: É uma aldrabice total, a fugir
reviews.reviewPositives: De nada
reviews.reviewNegatives: Falta de higiene total, desde a cozinha ás instalações sanitárias,  passando pela roupa de cama e toalhas. A cas de banho tinha uma fuga na sanita e no lavatório a torneira nunca se consegue fechar. Informo a recepção e fazem de conta que não percebem. Todos os quartos dos nossos colegas estavam na mesma situação ( 11 quartos) deve ser retirado imediatamente do serviço Booking.  São uns desonestos.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat memuaskan..pelayanan bagus....dan letak tidak jauh dari masjid baiturrahman dan museum tsunami. Pas depan lapangan
reviews.reviewComments: Very satisfying..good service....and located not far from Baiturrahman Mosque and the tsunami museum. Right in front of the field.

reviews.reviewPositives: 部屋は広くて清掃も行き届いていました。また朝食はいろいろと揃っていて美味しかった。オムレツも作りたてを食べることができました。
reviews.reviewNegatives: フェイスタオルとひげそりがあると良かった。

reviews.reviewComments: Perfectly located in the centre of Banda Aceh within walking distance of the tsunami museum, this hotel is the perfect choice for business or leisure travellers. Room was large, nicely appointed, and very comfortable. Large buffet breakfast is included. Definitely recommended!

reviews.reviewPositives:
Hotel bersih dan staf ramah
Makanan sedaap

reviews.originalComment:
Utk bintang 3, ini hotel sangat nyaman, lokasi di pusat kota, akses kemana2 dekat.
Sarapan cukup bervariasi, namun utk pelayanan di "egg corner" lambat, jam 7 masih blm bisa order..
Semoga ke depannya ada perbaikan
reviews.reviewComments: For a 3-star hotel, this hotel is very comfortable, located in the city center, with easy access to everywhere. The breakfast is quite varied, but the service at the "egg corner" is slow, and by 7 AM you still couldn't place an order. I hope there will be improvements in the future.

reviews.reviewPositives: 房间比较老，整体服务还不错。
reviews.reviewNegatives: 前台行李员不主动帮忙提行李，不知道为什么

reviews.reviewComments: A comfortable and elegant hotel with a strong Middle Eastern-inspired design. The room is clean, well-maintained, and suitable for a short stay. Check-in was smooth and the staff were polite and helpful. The location is convenient, making it a good choice for both leisure and business travellers.

reviews.reviewTitle: Ogólnie hotel czysty i w dobrej lokalizacji. Natomiast obsługa miła i uśmiechnięta, ale ani obsługa recepcji ani obsługa
reviews.reviewPositives: Lokalizacja
reviews.reviewNegatives: Obsługa w ogóle nie rozumiała po angielsku. Pomylone zamówienia, niezrealizowane zamówienia

reviews.reviewComments: I had an excellent stay! The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful throughout my visit. The hotel was spotless — very clean and well-maintained. The location was also perfect, close to shops, restaurants, and main attractions. I’d definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area.

reviews.reviewPositives: Her şey çok güzeldi

reviews.reviewComments: I have been twice to this hotel. Very convinient near to the mosque and town.  The breakfast is good. The staff are also very helpfull and good. Love this hotel and Aceh too

reviews.reviewTitle: A nite in portola grand arabia
reviews.reviewPositives: Location of the hotel

reviews.reviewComments:
The air conditioner in my room wasn’t working, so I requested a room change. The staff kindly arranged a new room for me, although it was in the older part of the hotel. I wasn’t completely satisfied, but I didn’t mind.

The next day, after they fixed the air conditioner in my original room, they offered me to move back  and I was really happy about it.

Good food also!

Thank you to the staff and the hotel for your kind assistance! Cheap price with good quality. If i come to Aceh, will definitely stay here again.

reviews.reviewPositives: Very good
reviews.reviewNegatives: No

reviews.reviewComments:
Best Location, depan lapangan Blang Padang, dan cuma 8 menit jalan kaki ke Masjid Raya Baiturrahman.

Fasilitas Hotel Lengkap sesuai standard bintang 3 (cuma air panas di KM aja yang tidak jalan).

Menginap 2 malam, tapi tidak berurut diselingi dgn 1 malam ke Sabang (titip koper di Hotel), pada malam kedua dapat kamar upgrade yg ada ruang tamu nya.

Sarapan relatif lengkap dan enak2, ada masakan khas aceh juga. 
Cukup puas menginap disini.
Terimakasih utk semua staf yang bertugas.

reviews.reviewPositives: Breakfast was very good

reviews.reviewComments: Walking distance to Aceh Tsunami Museum and there is public park in front of the hotel

reviews.reviewTitle: The facility is a little bit old. Hope that next time the staff can help carrying the luggage
reviews.reviewPositives: Good service at the front desk.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Pancake making is too slow.

reviews.reviewComments: I am impressed with hotel staff attitude providing good services at the counter as well at room. Also come with high integrity returning my mobile phone left at the hotel. Wiish you guys all the best.

reviews.reviewTitle: Kind staff, perfect location, comfy bed.
reviews.reviewPositives: The staff and the food and the atmosphere of the park next door. Very pleasant.

reviews.reviewComments: the location is very strategic, room is good and clean. food is just standard breakfast. easy check-in an checkout

reviews.reviewPositives: Good location.I’m just walking to Museum Tsunami about 5 minutes.All the facilities were good.The morning breakfast also all the food very delicious 👍😁

reviews.reviewComments: Good location. But room was not even ready at 2pm. Also, I booked 2 deluxe rooms but one seems bigger than the other. No hand towels in the bathroom. Handy to visit all the attractions in Banda Aceh.

reviews.reviewPositives: There was a nice rooftop restaurant. Good views, amazing for sunset, next to the park.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The WiFi inthe rooms was very weak, we had to go to the restaurant.

reviews.reviewComments: Really a Great Stay at thi hotel. 5 minute walk to Masjid Baiturrahman, 5 minute walk to Museum Tsunami as well, The room is great, overlooking the city, the bed is comfortable and the amenities in the room are all pretty complete with hairdryer included.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good location for an overnight stay in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewPositives:
The hotel is located very centrally in Medan and certainly one of the up-scale hotels in the city. We stayed overnight before heading on to Pulau Weh. Due to a bus delay, we checked in very late at night, which was not a problem due to 24/7 reception. Communication ahead of time was quick.
Please be advised that a sign at the entrance will inform you that this is a Sharia Hotel - for Western Tourists like us there seemed to be no specific expectation related to this, but we would recommend dressing respectfully when going to breakfast etc. (like most anywhere in Aceh actually).
reviews.reviewNegatives:
It felt like the hotel was a couple of years past its prime. E.g. you could see the wooden bathroom door frame was already falling apart.
Breakfast was a bit of a challenge for our European stomach, which is less of a complaint as an information to those choosing between hotel options (as we are very aware that we are not the main target audience for this hotel - there's few European tourists in Banda Aceh in general).

reviews.reviewComments: Walking distance about 750m to the Masjid Raya Baiturrahman. Clean room and nice shower.

reviews.reviewPositives: 1. LOCATION OF THE HOTEL VERY ACCESSIBLE
reviews.reviewNegatives:
1. SHOWER IN THE BATHROOM 

2. STAGNANT WATER IN A DRAIN CLOGGED SHOWER BATHROOM 

3. BATHROOM AMENITIES , SUCH AS BATH TOWELS. BATHROOM  ANTI NON-SLIP BATH MATT NOT PROVIDED, VERY SLIPPERY

reviews.reviewComments: Sangat istimewa menurut saya, selain lokasi yang sangat strategis dekat dengan mesjid raya Baiturrahman dan Museum Sunami, dekat juga dengan taman kota dengan berbagai hiburannya terutama mereka yang ingin bawa keluarga. Yang paling istimewa yaitu memiliki Roof Top, disini kita bisa melihat keindahan kota Aceh yang dikelilingi perbukitan dengan hijaunya hutan. Pokoknya KEREN dan sangat recomended

reviews.reviewPositives:
Good enough if .... 

All is good especially the location except for 4 things. It is convenient for guests who want to be close to the main attractions. Unfortunately we had to change rooms due to bad smell in the room that may have been caused by previous guests smoking in the bathroom or dampness or both. Secondly I specifically asked before booking about the internet connection, whether it is strong enough for an online meeting and the answer was yes, however I found out that it wasn't strong enough. Thirdly, the phones in the rooms were not working and no one explained about it. We were trying to get hold of room service and reception for ages before going down to ask what's wrong with it. Finally, I think guests should have priority parking over visitors of their restaurants. There's a night that we had to park at a paid parking opposite the hotel because it was full.

reviews.reviewComments:
My friends and I (both are ladies).

When we first arrived in front of the hotel, a man approached and took our luggage and bring inside. We were welcomed with drinks and smile. Such a gentle gesture from your staff. 

We checked in at the frontdesk, the receptionist is very nice. We were taken to our room at Level 2. Oh my. In my mind, is this 3 star hotel? Kind of 4 star. 

We took Deluxe Twin Room with affordable price (it was), around 170MYR/for two (1,800,000 rupiah), since it included breakfast (we took it to experience local foods).

The experience in this hotel is splendid and amazing. If you come to Acheh, I would recommend Portola Grand Arabia Hotel!

reviews.reviewPositives: I like the service that hotel have provide
reviews.reviewNegatives: The hotel should look more into the hotel room toilet cleaners

reviews.reviewComments:
The mini fridge is not working. The water from the aircond drip.

Got mosquitoes, a lot of ants & I found baby cockroaches near the bed.

Others great, spacious room space, no complaint.

reviews.reviewPositives: Nice service, smooth check in without any extra payment (deposit), as I already make the payment upfront. Getting the room, at level 3, toward the end of the corner. Spacious room, but the room floor a bit unsatisfactory, feel a bit sticky. Complete toiletries with a good laundry service, fast respond too. For the breakfast, the food not so variety. Maybe can be consider on more food options.

reviews.reviewComments: Went for a 3 nights stay during Ramadan. Nearby the Grand Mosque and during evening, there are stalls selling many street foods.

reviews.reviewPositives: Spacious room. Good location.
reviews.reviewNegatives: The towels are old and yellowish. Please change or clean it properly and use bleach to make it white!

reviews.reviewComments:
Hotel needs some improvement in customer service.

Nice rooms with a good location . In walking distance to tbe tsunami museum and good food spots. Hotel did not have irons to supply visitors with but they have have ironing boards in the rooms. 
Requested an additional pillow from the front desk which never arrived. 
Visited the resturant and they were out of stock on 3 food items that we ordered off the menue

reviews.reviewPositives: Close walk to everything. Roof top restaurant views. Nice park across road.

reviews.reviewComments: I got a good deal. The room is very spacious compared to another well known hotel in the area that I booked earlier with the similar price

reviews.reviewTitle: Good location,  staff need improvements,  hotel is OK
reviews.reviewPositives: Location
reviews.reviewNegatives: Staff slow and in helpful.  Restaurant closed yet no notification.  Made to sit at the roof bar in the wind and some rain to eat.

reviews.reviewComments: The staff were so professional and made our stay a very enjoyable experience.

reviews.reviewTitle: Fabulous hotel with wonderful staff and service.Highly recommend staying here you won't be sorry.
reviews.reviewPositives: This hotel knows how to make the guests feel at home.It is a pleasure to stay there.The room service meals are really great value and tasty.The breakfast is also great variety and plentiful.We will be back and a special thankyou to Eddie who made our stay so lovely.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Nothing at all.

reviews.reviewComments: lokasi yang dekat dengan pusat kota kamar yang nyaman dan bersih pelayanan yang ramah dan memuaskan serta makanan yang pas di lidah

reviews.reviewPositives:
1. The breakfast was amazing. 
2. Access to the main attractions is good.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Oh gosh. The hot water cannot be control. And the hot water runs out fast.

reviews.reviewTitle: Excellent Central Location, Clean and decent
reviews.reviewComments:
We loved the place, the Grand Arabia ( there was another w/out the Grand) near the Masjid Raya and the Tsunami museum w a large field in front.
Would recommend p to stay here.
👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

reviews.reviewPositives: Friendly staff, spacious rooms. Visit the island of Sabang!

reviews.reviewComments:
We stayed at this hotel for a couple of nights and had a generally pleasant experience. The rooms were clean, comfortable, and well-maintained, and the location was convenient for exploring the surrounding area.

we enjoyed the amenities and the overall atmosphere of the hotel. I’d still recommend this place,

reviews.reviewPositives: Nice hotel located near town centre. The facilities at the hotel was quite good. Nice breakfast provided.
reviews.reviewNegatives: At the begining, the rooms given had problem i.e water ponding in the bathroom after shower. We requested for change of room and the hotel gave another room. It was better room. Thanks to the hotel staff.

reviews.reviewComments: Friendly staff, ample parking space nxt to the hotel, limited choice of breakfast menu but sufficient, clean room. Shower control need to be repaired because hot and cold water is unstable.

reviews.reviewTitle: Good Choice to stay one of two Nights
reviews.reviewPositives:
Nice and clean rooms
Good breakfast
Real good Hotel Restaurant!

reviews.reviewComments:
Satisfied with the service.
Although can’t say the same for the buffet breakfast choices.

When we came at 6.30am, the food were not hot; some were cold.

The mee was so hard, and when we tried to soften them in the soup- the soup was only warm. Not hot enough to soften the noodles.

Considering it is a 3 star hotel, I give it a bit of lee-way.

reviews.reviewPositives: Staff is friendly and arranging
reviews.reviewNegatives: Wifi didn't work 90% of the time except in the lobby.

reviews.reviewComments: Staff di dalam hotel dan luar hotel sangat membantu. Makanan sarapan sedap. Dekat dengan taman untuk budak2.. jalan kaki je.

reviews.reviewPositives: The staf, the hotel.
reviews.reviewNegatives:
I stay room 405 and 320
Room 320 superb
But room 405:
The drain in shower cubicle: water out very very slow
The shower pressure not smooth and consider slow
The toilet door, need to replace or paint.

The rest, consider excellence.

reviews.reviewComments:
The location is trategic. Is walking distance (5min) to Museum Tsunami, opposite is the football field where they having funfair during weekend at night, and restaurant are nearby. I recommend Hawaii Seafood Restaurant, walkable from hotel. Good food at 1/3 the price. 
Tho it is great, but not perfect. Some ammenities need to be taking care of. shower heads were broken, not enough dustbin and power point were not functioning. The staffs are super kind.
I am very particular with room cleanliness.  I am satisfied with this hotel cleanliness.  The room size is large and comfortable to sleep.

Bilik besar..katil empuk cuma downside pintu toilet dah pecah2x . Breakfast dia turun pukul 6.30 tp menu omelet belum ready lagi . Siap tempat minum air sebelah tu  tadah air yang bocor Dr syiling.. cawan pun xbersih. Better tempat lain dan harga lebih murah siap hotel baru. Ni hotel dah lama.

Location wise the hotel is great..you can see the Tsunami museum, Baiturrahman mosque and the field where they hold events in the city, from the hotel. The breakfast room however was a bit small and rather stuffy and the food choices are limited but the food array generally taste great.

Fasiliti dan pusat wisata dekat.
Tapi, sarapan kurang sedap dan kurang pilihan. Dalam bilik air kurang bersih & ada lipas.
Mohon pihak hotel lebih pantau keadaan setiap bilik.

reviews.reviewTitle: Perfectly adequate if you can get by on less than 6 hours sleep
reviews.reviewComments:
Liked -  large room, comfortable bed, central location, breakfast included, polite staff., clean room and facilities, good AC..

Disliked - the loud, continuous piano muzak which is pumped into the corridors outside of guests’ bedrooms from 6 AM (just after the muezzin has finished) until midnight; the phone in my bedroom did not work, so I had to get dressed and speak in person to the reception staff about the music; opening the bedroom curtains revealed filthy windows, peeling wallpaper, and a rather grim view of the back of the hotel.
Lokasinya sangat strategis, tengah kota. Kamar luas sekali. Sarapan juga cukup memuaskan.
I have been staying there for the 4 times.  The previous stay was not good. Glad there are improvements made since then.  The room is ok, except i think they should improve the breakfast varieties.
Ac kamar 210 bocor air netes-netes sampai basah lantai, gak di cek atau apa ya, low maintenance banget jadi nya.  Padahal lokasi nya udah oke banget loh.

This was my second time staying in this hotel.  The first time was good.  I booked for 3 nights, i requested for large bed but they only kept twin bed for me.  Upon checked in late in the evening, found out the body wash, shampoo and conditioner bottles were empty.  No hair dryer. Curtain in the room was without shield, toilet room was broken and couldnt close properly.  two of the rooms light bulbs were not working.  Luckily the maintenance team was kind enough to fix the lights and the hair dryer for me.  second day, i left the room in the early morning and came back late.  After complained, found out the toilet body wash, shampoo and conditioner bottles were still empty. The hair dryer was sort of exploded when i used it.  No words to describe on how terrible my stay this time.

Very disappointed with the stay this time.  The room condition is totally out of expectation, infact below par.  The furniture are extremely old, towels are yellowish.  Heard mouse was running on the ceiling. Even i have requested to change room, but the condition is almost the same as well.
ok
Location and roof top
Highly recommended hotel in Banda Aceh
reviews.roomTypeName: Superior Queen Room (No View) with No Windows

reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommended hotel in Banda Aceh
Highly recommended hotel in Banda Aceh
The Best Hotel
reviews.roomTypeName: Superior Queen Room (No View) with No Windows

reviews.reviewComments: Tiptop

Nice room, nice food, excellent location.

Super great choice. I will come again.
Perfect location! Walking distance to all major attractions and restaurants
Untuk harga segini sangat worth it, fasilitas dan makanannya enak-enak
Ok
Bilik besar dan selesa
Nice
reviews.roomTypeName: Superior Queen Room (No View) with No Windows

reviews.reviewComments: A bit expensive
Thanks for the upgrade
Bilik best and besar. Breakfast kurang sikit tp still sedap
Everything was fine.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bagus banget, lokasi dekat lapangan blang padang atau park city nya banda Aceh. Sarapannya juga lumayan
reviews.reviewComments: The room is really nice, the location is close to Blang Padang field or Park City in Banda Aceh. The breakfast is also quite good.

reviews.originalComment: Alhamdulillah dpt Kamar bersih, luas dgn view Masjid Raya Baiturrahman, amenities lengkap, sarapan bervariasi dan rasanya lumayan. Anak² sy diberikan BF charge yg terjangkau utk 2anak. Di atas ada rooftop yg cozy utk sekedar me time sama keluarga. Will be back again n again... 💯
reviews.reviewComments: Thank God I got a clean, spacious room with a view of the Baiturrahman Grand Mosque, complete amenities, a varied breakfast with decent taste. My children were given an affordable BF charge for 2 kids. There is a cozy rooftop for some me time with family. Will be back again and again... 💯

No word can describe how we like it to share our day anniversary at the portola grand arabian hotel. Breakfast satisfied and nice.Toilet room clean and room smell nice .staff very kind and waiting area so big and comfortable.Husben and i like bed so much..big and cozy .. hve sofa and big space.tq Portola Grand arabian hotel .. you make our day . Last you can easy find restaurant and stall that area . every nigt infront hotel hve like pesta.enjoy guys .

reviews.originalComment: Letak strategis, dekat ke masjid Baiturrahman dan tempat rekreasi lainnya
reviews.reviewComments: Strategic location, close to Baiturrahman Mosque and other recreational areas.

Great location, comfy room, good food.. Nothing to be complained. Plus, their gesture to provide body wash and shampoo from Sensatia Botanicals is beyond words!! Definitely be the must stay hotel when visiting Banda Aceh.. 👍

Great location -  fronting the Lapangan Blang Padang (town park) where Aceh Thanks to thecworld monumen is located (3 min walk), plenty of night eatery and family activities and 7 min walk to Aceh Tsunami museum.
